starring: Abishan Jeevinth, Anaswara Rajan, Kavya Anil
synopsis: Sathya, wary of arranged matches, agrees to a blind date set up by his sister and meets Monisha, only to discover they once shared the same school as senior and junior. As they bond over memories, old crushes, and unspoken feelings, their journey reconnects them with the past and unexpectedly draws them closer, paving the way for new love.
